title: olearia axillaris
intro: Olearia axillaris, also known as the bushy daisy or coastal daisy bush, is a flowering shrub native to southeastern Australia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Olearia axillaris include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against bacterial and fungal infections. Olearia axillaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential medicinal and health benefits.
